urgent.reason: SECURITY — 13 advisories in May 2026 coordinated release
security_advisories: Denial of Service with Server Components
Middleware/Proxy bypass in App Router via segment-prefetch routes (Incomplete Fix Follow-Up)
DoS via connection exhaustion in Cache Components
Middleware/Proxy bypass through dynamic route parameter injection
Server-Side Request Forgery in WebSocket upgrades
Unbounded next/image disk cache growth (storage exhaustion)
urgent.action: npm install next@16.2.6 in all repos. Note: the-squeeze is on Next 15 — requires major upgrade to 16 first.

recommended.reason: 19.2.6 patch — type hardening and performance improvements
v4.3.0 — new scrollbar styling utilities, mauve/olive/mist/taupe color palettes, logical property utilities, first-class webpack plugin (performance boost in Next.js), new @container-size utility
recommended.action: npm install tailwindcss@4.3.0. Note: the-squeeze still on Tailwind v3 — plan migration to v4.

recommended.reason: Major version jump: 0.x -> 1.16.0 (released ~May 14). All repos are on old 0.x range; 1.x may have API changes.
recommended.action: Review 1.x migration guide before upgrading; API changes possible. Pin-test in one repo first.

recommended.reason: Node.js 26 released May 5 as new Current; Node 22 remains LTS. March 2026 security patches addressed 2 HIGH + 4 MEDIUM vulns in Node 22 — ensure you are on latest 22.x patch.
recommended.action: Verify Vercel deployments are on latest Node 22 LTS patch. Evaluate Node 26 adoption timeline.

fyi.reason: TypeScript is now at 6.0.3 (all repos pinned to 5.9.3). TypeScript 7 is targeting mid-2026 with a Go-based compiler; planned breaking changes: strict-by-default, ES5 target dropped, AMD/UMD/SystemJS removed.
fyi.action: Plan TS 6 -> 7 migration now. TS 7 breaking changes are significant. Do not auto-update.

fyi.reason: Vercel Firewall now manageable from CLI via `vercel firewall`. AI Gateway adds Fast Mode for Claude Opus 4.7 (~2.5x faster, 6x cost). Vercel Sandbox adds Node 26 support. Workflow Development Kit ships beta updates.
fyi.action: No action required. Consider using `vercel firewall` CLI for rule management.

fyi.reason: 3.8.1 available (minor bump from 3.7.0/3.8.0). Bug fixes and improvements.
Latest npm version is 1.12.37 (published ~April 10, 2026). No new release in the last 7 days.

summary.top_action: PATCH next TO 16.2.6 ACROSS ALL REPOS — 13 security advisories including DoS, SSRF, middleware bypass, and HTTP smuggling. Also: the-squeeze is 2 major versions behind on Next (15->16) and still on Tailwind v3.
